import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let trimmed = string.trim(line)
let n = string.len(trimmed)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    sum = sum + (b - 48)
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
